name: Clingons (Chex Marshmallow Treats)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9 x 13 pan.
2. In a microwave-safe bowl, microwave marshmallows, peanut butter, and margarine for two minutes or until melted. Stir until smooth.
3. Add cereal and M & M's, stirring to coat all pieces.
4. Spread the mixture in the prepared pan and press down slightly with the back of a buttered spoon.
5. Refrigerate for one hour.
6. Pull pieces from the pan or cut into squares. Makes about 7 cups of mix.
